title: plantago stricta var. divaricata
intro: Plantago stricta var. divaricata, also known as spreading plantain, is a variety of the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) that is characterized by its wide, flat leaves and sprawling habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of compounds like aucubin and alantolactone. The health benefits associated with consuming Plantago stricta var. divaricata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, and the dried leaves can also be used in capsule or tincture form.
